mapper.update: UPDATE app_user_inbox_read_state SET notice_baseline_initialized = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND notice_baseline_initialized = 0
UPDATE app_user_inbox_read_state SET message_baseline_initialized = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND message_baseline_initialized = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_notice n WHERE n.enabled = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM app_user_notice_read r WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} AND r.notice_id = n.id )
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM app_user_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(read_flag, 0) = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO app_user_notice_read (user_id, notice_id) SELECT #{userId}, id FROM app_notice WHERE enabled = 1
INSERT IGNORE INTO app_user_notice_read (user_id, notice_id) SELECT #{userId}, id FROM app_notice WHERE id = #{noticeId} AND enabled = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE app_user_message SET read_flag = 1, read_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND COALESCE(read_flag, 0) = 0
